subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enkindled with the love of God! That which thou hadst written was perused, and it betokened the yearning [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها المشتعله بمحبه الله آنچه مرقوم نموده بودی ملاحظه گردید دلالت بر آرزوی
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @devotion; sacrifice; consecration in teaching the Cause
